items.name: ʚ♡ɞ Oversized Off-shoulder Pink Graphic Shirt
Graphic V-Neck Tee Black Edition
items.description:
Cropped V-neck tee in sleek black, featuring bold “LOS ANGELES” lettering, subtle SIUNES embroidery, and a statement star pendant design. The glossy fabric finish enhances the streetwear vibe while keeping a polished, modern aesthetic. Feminine, confident, and effortlessly stylish — perfect for standout fits and urban looks.
